title: Archon + Jira: Drag a Ticket, Get a Pull Request (Live Build)
summary: Archon is an AI-powered coding automation tool that integrates with Jira to automatically fix bugs and open pull requests when tickets are created. The system maintains dedicated conversations per ticket and can orchestrate multi-step workflows across GitHub, Slack, Telegram, Discord, and Jira.
